criticalFixes.issue: Draft claimed block 1 was missing the location name ('svätyňa z , ktorá ...').
criticalFixes.resolution: FALSE POSITIVE — investigated and found the name is NOT missing. It exists as a <link> child node ("Mostu pri Bratislave", href to the Most pri Bratislave article) positioned between two text nodes. The draft's plain-text flattening apparently dropped inline link text, producing the illusion of a gap. No text was inserted (would have duplicated the existing link). Verified the excerpt field (independently generated) already contains the full phrase '...svätyňa z Mostu pri Bratislave, ktorá...', confirming the body was never actually broken. Applied only the accompanying grammar/typography fixes to the two surrounding text nodes.

criticalFixes.issue: Block 23: broken fragment '... from ... on ...' — leftover Vimeo embed attribution scaffolding.
criticalFixes.resolution: Removed as proposed. Confirmed content ('Tworcza10 Group_Slavonic temple in Arkona, Rugian Peninsula from Tworcza10 Group on Vimeo') is pure template debris immediately following the real content.embed block (22) which already carries the video. Block count 40 -> 39.

reviewed_no_change: 5× content.poem blocks (modern poetry, own author 'Ancestral Volkhves' + unattributed) — left untouched, not grammatical prose.

Extended paraphrases/citations from Thietmar, Adam of Bremen, Ebbo and Herbord chronicles (blocks 4-9, 31-32, 36-37) — not in separate quote-block components, part of continuous narrative per pass1 note; only typography (dashes, quotes) touched, no lexical/bohemism changes made inside these passages to stay safe re: §21.3 spirit even though they are not formally 'protected zones'.
'ka.t' (block 37) — likely a damaged transcription of an Old Slavic root with a special diacritic (nasal vowel); left unchanged, insufficient confidence to correct.
